expectations.text: Rewritten text does not contain 'probably', 'essentially', 'in most cases', 'might be', or 'generally recommended'.
expectations.evidence: None of the hedging words are present.

expectations.text: Text uses imperative voice (e.g., 'Use PostgreSQL', 'Set up connection pooling').
expectations.evidence: Text starts directly with 'Use PostgreSQL' and 'Set up connection pooling'.
